I'm Hardhik V, a 20-year-old AI Engineering student from Hosur, Tamil Nadu. I completed my schooling at Sri Bharathi Vidyalaya Matric Higher Secondary School, and I'm currently pursuing B.E. in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning at K.S. Rangasamy College of Technology (2023–2027).

My father is a dedicated employee who inspires my work ethic every day. With a strong passion for technology and innovation, I aspire to grow into a skilled AI professional and contribute meaningfully to the tech industry.
